message:
Refactor ActiveAlerts and DeploymentStatus to use CardClusterFilter (#585)

Replace custom cluster filter dropdown implementations with the unified
CardClusterFilter component for consistency across cards.

Changes:
- Remove createPortal import (handled by CardClusterFilter)
- Remove unused Filter/ChevronDown icons
- Remove clusterFilterBtnRef and dropdownStyle from filters destructure
- Replace inline dropdown JSX with CardClusterFilter component

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
